jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at Juspay
jsonLd.description:
We at Juspay are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Juspay:
Juspay is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juspay!
